data.summary: The exploratory step is blocked due to insufficient evidence to validate the requirement.
data.assessment: The requirement to validate the recovery campaign triggers (email/SMS/push) cannot be confirmed as there is no direct evidence provided that demonstrates these triggers are implemented or functioning. The linked use case outlines the need for these triggers, but the evidence does not include any checks or confirmations regarding their existence. Therefore, the validation step is inconclusive as it lacks the necessary information to assert a hard requirement failure.
gaps: No evidence of recovery campaign triggers (email/SMS/push) implementation.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the existence and functionality of recovery campaign triggers.
